full_text:
Deng Fang (Kongshan) 鄧方 (孔山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Fang (鄧方), styledKongshan (孔山), was born in Nan. Followed Liu Bei into Shu and was later given command of the south. Deng Fang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Deng Fang lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
